summary: I agree with the prior conclusion that cells undergoing necroptosis show disruption of their cell membranes. Evidence shows that MLKL forms pores in the plasma membrane, leading to direct membrane damage and cellular lytic events characteristic of necroptosis. \boxed{{A}}
formatted_summary: agent2 (Round 2 summarized): I agree with the prior conclusion that cells undergoing necroptosis show disruption of their cell membranes. Evidence shows that MLKL forms pores in the plasma membrane, leading to direct membrane damage and cellular lytic events characteristic of necroptosis. \boxed{{A}}. Answer choice: A
